metadata.name: Consult a Technical Manual for a Repair

description: A technician is working on an unfamiliar piece of equipment and needs to access its technical service manual.

nodes.task_description: Identify the asset tag or model number of the equipment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the specific equipment being worked on.

nodes.task_description: Search the technical document library for the corresponding service manual.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds and opens the PDF of the service manual.

nodes.task_description: Navigate to the troubleshooting section for 'motor faults' to find repair instructions.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully locates the relevant section of the manual to guide their repair.
